card_description: Albertus Magnus is a historical figure referenced in Philip K. Dick's Exegesis. Context: "Conclusion of the letter to Henry Korman."

linked_segments.summary: Conclusion of the letter to Henry Korman. Dick discusses the alchemical transmutation as a spontaneous, irreversible psychic process and links his "teletype" communication with Erasmus to the AI syste
